subject: [PATCH v5 14/21] mm: swap: decouple virtual swap slot from backing store

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch decouples the virtual swap slot from its backing store, allowing a swap entry to be backed by one of four options: physical swap slot, zero swap page, compressed object in zswap pool, or in-memory page. This change enables the use of zswap and zero swap page optimization without reserving a swapfile slot, resulting in significant disk savings for hosts with high memory usage. The patch also introduces new requirements for batched swap operations to ensure consistency across entries with different backing states.
